why_wrong: Final Step Max Observer File: forces the main output to zero, so coarse compilation passes but behavioral stimulus points fail.
Final Step Max Observer File: keeps the main datapath plausible while reporting the wrong metric value.
Final Step Max Observer File: mishandles reset or initialization, passing steady-state samples but failing startup or recovery checks.
Final Step Max Observer File: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
Final Step Max Observer File: uses a wrong gain or scale factor, leaving shape plausible while calibrated checks fail.
